text: Sen. Darline Graham will seek full term to her late brother’s seat - The Washington Post

text: Court ruling freezes Paramount-Warner Bros. merger for now - NPR
fullText: Paramount's owners were hoping they'd be firmly in control of rival Warner Bros. Discovery by the end of this week. Monday's temporary restraining order puts that plan on hold.

text: Iran War Updates: U.S. launches 10th night of strikes after 3 U.S. troops killed, nearly 100 injured in recent weeks - CBS News

text: FDA still focused on Taylor Farms lettuce as Cyclospora source despite retracted test - NPR
fullText: The FDA says lettuce distributed by Taylor Fresh Foods and Taylor Farms de Mexico is still linked to the multistate outbreak of cyclosporiasis. But the source may be difficult to definitively trace.

text: Up to 5 cups of coffee per day may potentially lower heart disease risk, doctors say - WTOP
